zh.lifeSummary: 當Ffelis ferch Morgan於1430年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根拉迪爾時，她的父親Morgan ap Ieuan47歲，母親Agnes ferch Thomas32歲。她和Llywelyn ap Dafydd至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): from the medieval Welsh personal name Morgan, Morgant (Old Welsh Morcant, of uncertain etymology).
Irish: importation of the Welsh surname (see 1 above), to which has been assimilated more than one Gaelic surname, notably Ó Muireagáin (see Merrigan ).
Scottish: probably from a Gaelic personal name cognate with Welsh Morcant.

variants.name: Merrigan
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireagáin ‘descendant of Muireagán’ a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’. Compare Morgan , with which this name has been confused.

variants.name: Morgans
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): variant of Morgan , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Ffelis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Felix
meanings: name meaning ‘happy, fortunate’, which has from time to time been popular as a given name in Britain and elsewhere because of its auspicious omen. It was in use as a byname in Latin, applied for example to the dictator  Sulla  (  138–178  bc  ). It was very popular among the early Christians, being borne by a large number of early saints.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: When Ffelis ferch Morgan was born in 1430, in Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Morgan ap Ieuan, was 47 and her mother, Agnes ferch Thomas, was 32. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Llywelyn ap Dafydd.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ffelis ferch Morgan 1430 in Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Morgan ap Ieuan 47 und ihre Mutter Agnes ferch Thomas 32. Sie hatte mit Llywelyn ap Dafydd mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ffelis ferch Morgan è nata il nel 1430 nel Radyr, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Morgan ap Ieuan, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Agnes ferch Thomas, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Llywelyn ap Dafydd.

ja.lifeSummary: Ffelis ferch Morganが1430年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンラディルで生まれた時，父Morgan ap Ieuanは47歳，母Agnes ferch Thomasは32歳であった。彼女はLlywelyn ap Dafyddとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Ffelis ferch Morgan(이)가 1430년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 라디르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Morgan ap Ieuan(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes ferch Thomas(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Llywelyn ap Dafydd(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.
